author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Ojisan wa Kawaii Mono ga Osuki.' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, First Promo for Fall 2026
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Tsutomu's Ojisan wa Kawaii Mono ga Osuki. (Middle-Aged Man Loves Cute Things) manga revealed the main cast, staff, and a first promotional video on Thursday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere in October 2026. Cast Mitsutaka Oji: Kazuyuki Okitsu (The Fable) Pugtaro: Miyu Tomita (Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai? Tensai-tachi no Renai Zunousen) Bosskichi: Fuuka Izumi (Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete) Anne: Yurie Funato (Hoshikuzu Telepa...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kabushikigaisha Magi-Lumière 2nd Season' Unveils Additional Cast, Opening Theme, Second Promo
The official website of the Kabushikigaisha Magi-Lumière 2nd Season (Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. Season 2) television anime unveiled a pair of additional cast, the opening theme, and a second promotional video on Thursday. The anime series adapting Sekka Iwata and Yuu Aoki's mahou shoujo manga is scheduled to premiere on Nippon TV at 1:05 a.m. on July 5. Voice actors Manaka Iwami (Fruits Basket) and Masaya Fukunishi (Kaijuu 8-gou) are joining the cast as Sakae Tounomori and Hibiki...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Majutsu wo Kiwamete Tabi ni Deta Tensei Elf, Moteamashita Jumyou de Ikeru Densetsu to Naru' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo, 2027 Debut
Production company Asmik Ace opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Monsho Sasakibara's Majutsu wo Kiwamete Tabi ni Deta Tensei Elf, Moteamashita Jumyou de Ikeru Densetsu to Naru (The Reincarnated Elf Left on a Journey to Master His Magic and With His Extra Lifespan Became a Living Legend) light novel on Thursday, revealing the main cast, staff, a teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video. The anime series will premiere in 2027. Voice actors Hana Hishik...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Nisemono no Renkinjutsushi' Receives TV Anime Adaptation
Production company Kadokawa opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Jirou Sugiura and Umemaru's Nisemono no Renkinjutsushi (The Fake Alchemist) manga on Thursday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured), an announcement promo and Passione as the animation studio. Sugiura originally began drawing the fantasy isekai series on pixiv in February 2020. Kadokawa began serializing the manga on its ComicWalker web service in June 2023 and released the first volume in January 20...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Sunrise Commemorates 50th Anniversary with Six Short Movies
Production company Bandai Namco Filmworks announced a short movie project commemorating Sunrise's 50th anniversary titled Mirai e no Kouro (A Voyage Towards the Future) on Wednesday. The project comprises six original 3DCG short movies, with six participating studios including Sunrise. The official website also revealed the first two shorts with the main staff, teaser visuals (pictured right), and teaser promotional videos. Hidekazu Ohara (Sweat Punch) is directing the short anime Haseo Sug...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Mebius Dust' Announces Additional Cast
The official website for the Mebius Dust television anime announced additional cast on Wednesday. The anime will premiere on Tokyo MX at 11.30 p.m. followed by BS Fuji and MBS on July 9. Cast Marimo Shippo: Hiroshi Tsuchida (Shingeki no Kyojin) Tenrou: Ryohei Shioguchi Shirayuki: Ryou Hirohashi (Boku no Hero Academia) Takara: Yuuki Kuwahara (Seirei Gensouki) Kirara: Mari Hino (Mato Seihei no Slave) Atsushi: Hiromichi Tezuka (Edens Zero) Tarou Iwasaki (Amaama to Inazuma) is directing the anime at...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Choujun! Choujou-senpai' Unveils Main Cast, First Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Shun Numa's Choujun Choujou-senpai (Super Psychic Policeman Chojo) manga revealed the main cast, main visual (pictured right), and first promotional video on Thursday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on Tuesdays at 11:00 p.m. on Fuji TV and Kantai TV stations in October 2026.
